An '''Imperial sentry ship''' was a craft used to protect a secure area from intruding [[Starship/Legends|spacecraft]].

==History==
These ships patrolled the perimeter of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|armada]] commanded by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Mils Giel]] during the mission to transport the [[Teezl]] to the Imperial [[Coruscant/Legends|capital]].

{{Ship-stub}}
